pr.title: BPB 1.13872 — LeakyReLU(0.5)² + Per-Layer LR Legal TTT (3 seeds)

output.summary: Depth-recurrent 11-layer GPT pairs LeakyReLU(0.5)² SmearGate MLPs with Partial RoPE/VE and legal score-first TTT using per-layer/intra-chunk cosine LR.
techniques: LeakyReLU(0.5)² SmearGate MLP in 11-layer depth recurrence with Partial RoPE and value embeddings
Legal score-first TTT via SGD with frozen blocks, per-layer LR multipliers, and intra-chunk cosine decay
BigramHash + XSA skips within int6-quantized model under 16MB
